body:
Elena, hope your new year is off to a strong start! I've been meaning to loop back with you after the [Breakthrough Energy Ventures](orgs/breakthrough-energy-ventures) panel we both caught in December — a few of those grid-scale storage pitches have been rattling around in my head ever since. We're currently doing diligence on two early-stage companies in that space and I'd love to get your read, given Crossbeam's work on the infrastructure side. Any chance you have 30 minutes in the next couple of weeks for a quick call? I'll send over a Calendly link if that works for you.

Amara
